jobs.description: Built scalable FastAPI backend services for large-scale data processing and API delivery, integrating PostgreSQL with efficient querying, preprocessing and caching. Converted complex climate & water-productivity research models into production-ready logic, and shipped modular data flows enabling real-time indicator calculations across districts and crops.

Developed and optimized full-stack web apps for 1,000+ users with React.js and Node.js. Cut page load time by ~35% via code splitting, lazy loading and image optimization, built reusable UI components and API services that lifted dev speed by 25%, and integrated REST APIs for seamless frontend–backend communication.
